parameters.query: INSERT INTO app.ai_response_log (response_id, ticket_id, user_message, matched_kb_ids, search_score, ai_response, confidence_score, escalated) VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, NULL, '{{ $json.original_text }}', '{{ $json.matched_kb_id }}', {{ $json.confidence }}, '{{ $json.response.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.confidence }}, false) RETURNING response_id

INSERT INTO app.helpdesk_tickets (ticket_id, reporter_name, location, issue_type, urgency, summary, status, source_channel, source_message_id) VALUES ('TKT-' || to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(ticket_id FROM 13) AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1 FROM app.helpdesk_tickets WHERE ticket_id LIKE 'TKT-' || to_char(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%')::text, 4, '0'), '{{ $json.user_name }}', NULL, 'OTHER', 'MEDIUM', '{{ $json.original_text.substring(0, 200).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'OPEN', 'SLACK', '{{ $json.ts }}') RETURNING ticket_id

INSERT INTO app.escalation_log (escalation_id, ticket_id, original_message, ai_response, ai_confidence, escalation_reason, escalation_team) VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, '{{ $json.ticket_id }}', '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.original_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.response.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.confidence }}, '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.escalation_reason.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $('Parse Agent Response').first().json.escalation_team }}')

meta.description: Slack Webhook経由でヘルプデスク問い合わせを受け、Cortex AgentでFAQ検索・AI回答を生成。解決可能なら自動回答、不可なら担当者にエスカレーション。
